## Meeting Purpose

[Technical interview with Glenn Lawyer for a Data Scientist role at Growthx.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Background:** Glenn Lawyer has 15 years in academia (neuroscience, evolutionary dynamics) and experience at startups (CyberHedge, acquired) and large tech (Stripe).](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Current Role:** As Staff Data Scientist at Invoca, he manages the core marketing attribution model—a complex, multi-channel Bayesian Pitman-Yor model—and leads the company's AI pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Key Project:** Developed an LLM-based labeling tool that cuts client onboarding from two weeks to two days. The project was CEO-endorsed but shelved for \~6 months due to institutional inertia before being greenlit for production.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [**Growthx Case Study:** Proposed measuring LLM brand visibility by querying top LLMs with weighted Google search phrases. This approach is a scrappy, short-term solution, as the future of LLM search is uncertain (e.g., paid placement, lack of query data).](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)

## Topics

### Background & Experience

  - [**Academic:** PhD in neuroscience (structural MRI), postdoc in evolutionary dynamics (viral spread).](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Startups:** Co-founder of CyberHedge (acquired). Built the tech stack and team as the first technical hire.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Stripe (1.5 yrs):**](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Project:** Investigated misbilling issues for enterprise clients.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Finding:** The core problem wasn't pricing anomalies but client frustration over unpredictable invoices from variable card mixes.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
      - [**Solution:** Built a simple AR(2) time-series model to flag these unpredictable bills, enabling proactive CSM outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [**Invoca (Current):** Staff Data Scientist.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [**Company:** 350-person firm providing marketing attribution for inbound phone calls.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Role:** Manages the core attribution model and leads the AI pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### Invoca: Core Model & AI Pivot

  - [**Core Model:** A multi-channel Bayesian Pitman-Yor model with six layers of priors.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A bag-of-words approach is superior to embeddings for spoken language, which is noisy and contains sparse, high-signal words (e.g., "new patient").](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [**AI Pivot:** Invoca is pivoting to an "AI-first" strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**LLM Labeling:** Using LLMs for bulk data labeling, reserving humans for edge cases.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [**Embedding Models:** Exploring for simpler, out-of-the-box signals.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**AI Agents:** Building agents trained on human agent call data to replicate their conversational style.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### Invoca: LLM Labeling Project

  - [**Problem:** Custom model onboarding took two weeks due to slow human labeling.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [**Solution:** Developed an LLM-based tool to automate labeling.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
      - [**Process:** LLM labels calls → Trains model → Evaluates on new LLM-labeled data.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
      - [**Result:** Reduced onboarding to two days with minimal performance loss.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
      - [**Validation:** LLM was correct 80–90% of the time; manual review showed the LLM was often right even when it disagreed with human labels.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [**Production:** The project, initially shelved for \~6 months, was greenlit after the company's AI pivot gained traction.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)

### Growthx Case Study: Measuring LLM Brand Visibility

  - [**Challenge:** Measuring brand visibility in LLM search, where data is opaque and the future is uncertain.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=2383.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution (Short-Term):**](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
    1.  [**Define Queries:** Use top Google search phrases, weighted by their popularity, as a proxy for LLM queries.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=3183.0)
    2.  [**Query LLMs:** Run these phrases against major LLMs (e.g., OpenAI, Gemini).](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
    3.  [**Measure:** Track brand mentions and rank in responses to create a weighted visibility score.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=2600.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** User behavior will be stable, with users asking questions in LLMs as they do in Google.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=2728.0)
  - [**Verification:** Test the hypothesis by comparing response variability between natural-language questions (low entropy) and keyword-based queries (high entropy).](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=2956.0)
  - [**Long-Term Challenge:** The model is fragile due to opaque LLM data, potential paid placement, and evolving user behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=3248.0)
  - [**Measuring Impact:** Use metric improvement over time, as controlled experiments are not feasible without holdout groups.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=3619.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fathom:** Contact Glenn Lawyer regarding the next steps in the interview process.](https://fathom.video/share/8UTmkwyNmGjcfnhPu8QSSPRaECUstz5r?tab=summary&timestamp=3906.0)
